_meta.derivation: earliest commit per author_login from commits.json; enrich via /commits/{sha} for files/stats

data.author: ottojo
data.message: only call listbox end if it is visible

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+# rig-reconfigure
+
+RQT reconfigure alternative based on [Dear ImGui](https://github.com/ocornut/imgui) and the corresponding python bindings
+provided by [imviz](https://github.com/joruof/imviz).
+

data.author: malban
data.message: Fix parameter input widget widths by removing explicit calculation.

data.author: clalancette
data.message:
Add dependency on ament_index_cpp (#29)

This is required to compile on the latest Rolling.

files.patch:
@@ -40,8 +40,7 @@ add_executable(${PROJECT_NAME} src/rig_reconfigure.cpp src/service_wrapper.cpp s
 #target_link_options(${PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE -fsanitize=thread)
 
 target_include_directories(${PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE include external/imspinner external/lodepng)
-target_link_libraries(${PROJECT_NAME} imgui)
-ament_target_dependencies(${PROJECT_NAME} rclcpp)
+target_link_libraries(${PROJECT_NAME} imgui rclcpp::rclcpp ament_index_cpp::ament_index_cpp)
 
 install(TARGETS ${PROJECT_NAME}
         DESTINATION lib/${PROJECT_NAME}

data.author: cottsay
data.message:
Add missing buildtool_depends on git

This dependency is needed for a call to FetchContent_Declare.
